_notes.id: required bus client id for this MAVLink bridge
_notes.conn_type: required connection type accepted by pymavlink (udp/serial/tcp/etc)
_notes.conn_str: required address string for mavutil.mavlink_connection (e.g. 'udpin:0.0.0.0:14550' or '/dev/ttyUSB0')
_notes.conn_bitrate: required bitrate/baud for the link; serial uses it directly
_notes.is_interface: optional; true when this link is the primary autopilot interface and should wait for heartbeat
_notes.is_datalink: optional; true when this link forwards frames as a datalink
